work_done: Established a consistent account UI system with premium typography (Newsreader + Outfit), refined spacing, and card‑based layouts. Split the account experience into Profile view, Profile edit, and Settings screens to reduce cognitive load and isolate security actions. Removed sidebars on account pages to maximize form readability on large screens.
